title: stelis atrorubens
intro: Stelis atrorubens, also known as the black-red stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis atrorubens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stelis atrorubens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
